title: Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 2
content:
{{Top|rwm|old|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:TOTJomnibus2.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Omnibus:
Tales of the Jedi Volume 2'' |writer=[[Tom Veitch]], [[Kevin J. Anderson]] |penciller= |inker= |letterer= |colorist= |cover artist=[[Steve Ellis]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[April 9]], [[2008]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/14-931/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi-Omnibus-Volume-2|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi Omnibus Volume 2}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=464 |isbn=1593079117 |isbn2= |timeline= |series=[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']]/''[[Star Wars Omnibus]]'' |issues=Volume 2 |preceded by=[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 1|''Tales of the Jedi Volume 1'']] |followed by=[[Star Wars Omnibus: Droids|''Droids'']] }} '''''Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 2''''' is the fifth [[Star Wars Omnibus]] by [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]], collecting several issues of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] comics. ==Publisher's summary== ''Learn the fate of the ancient Jedi Order's most legendary heroes in this huge collection! ''In a time when Jedi were numerous and the Sith Empire but a bitter memory, an ancient evil rose again, corrupting one of the Jedi's finest and igniting a war that ravaged worlds. The Sith were reborn, ties of friendship and family were betrayed, and the lives of Jedi Nomi Sunrider and Ulic Qel-Droma were changed forever.'' ===Back cover summary=== ''Nearly [[4000 BBY/Legends|four thousand years]] before [[19 BBY/Legends|the birth]] of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] faces its greatest threat since the founding of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]''. ''In a time when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were numerous and the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] but a bitter memory, an [[Marka Ragnos|ancient evil]] rose again, corrupting [[Exar Kun/Legends|one of the Jedi's finest]] and igniting a [[Great Sith War/Legends|war]] that ravaged worlds. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] were reborn, ties of friendship and family were betrayed, and the course of the galaxy's future is forever altered.'' ==Contents== *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 5]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 2]]
